summary: Iteration 63 - Bug Fixes Verification. All 5 issues verified: 1) Signal card hidden on desktop (md:hidden), 2) Balance calculation shows pre-trade balance, 3) Daily Projection shows current day (Jan 20), 4) Licensee profit calculation fixed (current_amount - starting_amount), 5) OnboardingWizard mobile-friendly layout confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: get_member_details now calculates current_amount dynamically for extended licensees using calculate_extended_license_projections, ensuring consistency with /api/admin/licenses endpoint
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed licensee profit calculation in get_member_details to use dynamic projection calculation for extended licensees
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bug fixes verified: Issue 1 (Signal Card md:hidden) - PASS, Issue 2 (Balance Before calculation) - PASS, Issue 3 (Date handling with local date format) - PASS, Issue 4 (Licensee profit = current_amount - starting_amount) - PASS (required additional fix to calculate current_amount dynamically for extended licensees), Issue 5 (OnboardingWizard mobile layout) - PASS. Backend tests: 8/8 passed. Frontend tests: All visual verifications passed.
